name: WeETH
description: Wrapped eETH is the first native liquid restaking token on Ethereum. Stakers can mint eETH on ether.fi. When a user does this, ether.fi will then stake and restake the ETH, allowing users to maximize rewards. By minting eETH you are getting exposure to 4 types of rewards: 1) Ethereum staking rewards 2) ether.fi Loyalty Points 3) restaking rewards (including EigenLayer points) 4) ability to provide liquidity to Defi protocols.
